## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Directive data
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Build or CI

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run compile`
- [ ] `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] Manual VS Code extension test, if UI behavior changed

## Risk

- [ ] No production secrets, certificates, tokens, or internal configs are included.
- [ ] No runtime dependency was added.
- [ ] User-facing diagnostics or completion text is actionable.
- [ ] HAProxy version behavior is covered by tests when relevant.
